Container.Name: RustDo
Container.Overview: RustDo is a clean, secure, and minimalist ToDo list application built in Rust with Yew and Axum. It runs out-of-the-box on Unraid.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Location to store persistent todo lists

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional cryptographic access PIN to lock the application. Leave empty for public/no-auth mode.

Config.Name: Site Title
Config.Description: Custom website title rendered in header.

Config.Name: Single List Mode
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to restrict the application to a single task list, hiding the list sidebar.
